server.name: gmail-mcp
server.description: Gmail MCP Server — search, read, and reply to emails via Gmail API

search_emails.description: Search emails in Gmail using a query string. Returns a list of matching emails with metadata.

query.description: Gmail search query, e.g. 'subject:application to:company@example.com' or 'in:sent to:recruiter'

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 5)

get_email.description: Get full details of a specific email by its Gmail message ID. Returns sender, recipient, date, subject, and full body.

email_id.description: The Gmail message ID (obtained from search_emails)

reply_email.description: Reply to an existing email thread via Gmail API. Does NOT use Gmail UI. Preserves thread context using In-Reply-To and References headers.

email_id.description: The Gmail message ID to reply to

reply_body.description: The plain-text body of your reply message

prompts.no_emails_found: No emails found matching your query.
prompts.reply_success: Reply sent successfully via Gmail API!
